name: 05-13-npc-fallback-memory-truthfulness
title: NPC fallback + memory truthfulness — no progress badge on non-answer
description: Detect non-answer fallback in chat response. Do not show progress/memory/relationship badges when fallback fires. Only show badges when NPC gave a real, non-fallback response.
scope: backend detects fallback, frontend gates badges
creator: claude
notes:
Child task of 05-12-onsite-visitor-brutal-audit-issues. Combines issues #6 (NPC fallback non-response) and #7 (memory/relationship overclaim). Backend must flag fallback response; frontend must gate badges behind non-fallback response.
2026-05-13 lijin claimed task after user reported misleading chat progress/memory feedback; focus: flag/gate fallback/non-answer so UI does not show fake progress badges.
2026-05-13 implementation complete: backend returns is_fallback/fallback_notice for non-answer fallbacks and skips affinity/memory/state-card progress; frontend gates progress badges and memory append behind is_fallback !== true; verification.md and evidence/ contain build/test/browser results.
